name: AA_CLFLINE_001
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[AA_CLFLINE_001] AS

SELECT 
(SELECT MAX(PROJECTREF) FROM LG_001_01_ORFICHE WHERE CLIENTREF=L.CLIENTREF) PRJ
,(SELECT MAX(TRCURR) FROM LG_001_01_ORFICHE WHERE CLIENTREF=L.CLIENTREF) TRCURR2
,(SELECT MAX(RATES1) FROM L_DAILYEXCHANGES WHERE EDATE=L.DATE_ AND CRTYPE=(SELECT MAX(TRCURR) FROM LG_001_01_ORFICHE  WHERE PROJECTREF=L.CLPRJREF)) TRRATE2
,CASE WHEN TRCURR=20 THEN TRNET ELSE L.AMOUNT/(SELECT MAX(RATES1) FROM L_DAILYEXCHANGES WHERE EDATE=L.DATE_ AND CRTYPE=(SELECT MAX(TRCURR) FROM LG_001_01_ORFICHE  WHERE PROJECTREF=L.CLPRJREF)) END   AS AMOUNT2
,* FROM LG_001_01_CLFLINE AS L
